evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long contributes 37 trades and $1379.5 with 5.1 minute median hold, but owns the global -527 MAE. The worst tail is a high ES-VWAP extension, negative acceleration, large pullback/rolling-high state; protected extended-VWAP winners mean blunt global extension caps are unsafe.
name: Charm Pin High-Extension Recovery Classifier
risk: A crude config translation can block profitable extended-VWAP charm-pin recoveries and suppress fast-winner PnL.
trigger: VALID_0DTE charm_pin_pullback_long entry with high ES-VWAP extension, weak or negative VWAP acceleration, large rolling-high/pullback distance, and delayed early profit behavior.
validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE from -527 toward <= -403 while retaining at least 90% of charm-pin PnL and at least 95% of fast charm-pin winners.

evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY breakout fallback produces 20 trades and $1310.2, but average MAE is -123.9. Prior direct 1DTE tightening damaged score and PnL, suggesting the next useful move is a companion state rather than stricter breakout filters.
name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
risk: May be unreachable or cannibalize profitable breakout_long_1dte trades depending on router ordering and profile trigger overlap.
trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state resembles pullback/reclaim rather than breakout continuation.
validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL remains at least current $1310, 1DTE average MAE improves versus -123.9, and total net profit remains at least 98% of run_001.
